pr-evidence/release-bundle-pr-evidence-r.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review initially returned no findings and noted only a low residual CLI coverage gap. The CLI regression was added, and follow-up review returned no findings.
verification: GPT-5.5 follow-up review after adding CLI coverage
what_changed: Added an API-level release-bundle regression for a PR evidence sidecar that claims ok=true while leaving GPT-5.5 review findings unresolved.
Added a public CLI regression for the same malformed PR evidence sidecar.
Updated release-bundle README guidance to require valid PR evidence with Refactor evidence, completed GPT-5.5 review, and resolved GPT-5.5 findings.
pr-evidence/release-bundle-pr-evidence-r.why: Release bundles are the durable handoff for open-source release readiness, so they must not include traceability sidecars that leave AI-review findings unresolved.
